description:
Second subticket. Depends on .16.1.

Today `defmodule` bodies only accept fn/defmacro/defmodule/alias/import/@. To support `test "name" do ... end` we need calls (specifically: macro calls) at item-position.

## Scope

- AST: Item::MacroCall { name: String, args: Vec<Expr> } — recognized in parse_items_until alongside Tok::Fn etc.
- Parser: at the start of an item slot, peek for Ident followed by LParen; if so, parse it as a Call and wrap as Item::MacroCall.
- Resolver: pass through MacroCall items unchanged for .16.2 — .16.3 takes over expansion.
- Eval / load_program errors on MacroCall reaching it (must be expanded first).

## Tests

- defmodule with a top-level call parses without erroring.
- Item::MacroCall lands in the parsed AST.
title: Module-top-level macro calls
